system.description:
Fear not the dark, for I am your guide.

LEVEL 3

Umbrous Mark. Your Lifebinding Spirit is marked by darkness and deals Necrotic damage. When you, your Lifebinding Spirit or an ally within Reach 4 deal Necrotic damage to an enemy, you may spend 1 Mana to also inflict Blinded on that enemy until the end of their next turn.

Light in the Darkness. You gain the Light Bearer Sacred Grace. Searing Light can now target Blinded creatures. You also gain Darkvision 6.

LEVEL 7

Lost in Shadow. When you hit a Blinded enemy with Searing Light, they become Frightened of you until the end of their next turn and move 3 spaces in a random direction.

Snuff Out. Light dims nigh imperceptibly in your presence. Nocturnal animals often seem to follow you. As an action, you may extinguish all mundane light sources that you can see.

LEVEL 11

Light in the Darkness (2). Light Bearer now regains 2 uses of Searing Light. Searing Light now uses d12s.

LEVEL 15

Cloak of Darkness. (1/encounter) Action: Don a billowing Cloak of Darkness for up to WIL turns. The Cloak has an aura that inflicts Blinded on enemies within Reach 2.
